title: Record: 11L VR + GA + LeakyReLU² + Legal Score-First TTT (val_bpb=pending)
body:
## Summary

**val_bpb = pending rerun** | 8xH100 SXM | Legal score-first TTT

Architecture improvements on the standard 11L stack: Value Residual + Gated Attention + LeakyReLU(0.5)², with legal score-first TTT.

## Update (Mar 23)

Initial submission used pre-eval TTT (non-compliant per #402). This update switches to **legal score-first TTT**: score each validation chunk before training on it. Score pending rerun with compute credits.

## Architecture

- **Value Residual** (arXiv:2410.17897): Learned lambda blends first-block V into subsequent blocks. +2 params/layer.
- **Gated Attention** (arXiv:2505.06708): Per-head sigmoid gate on attention output. +4104 params/layer.
- **LeakyReLU(0.5)²**: Replaces relu² in MLP. Preserves negative gradient flow.
- **Legal score-first TTT**: AdamW lr=1e-4, 3 epochs, cosine LR across 131K-token chunks, last 2 blocks + norms unfrozen. Every token scored BEFORE model trains on it.

VR+GA ablated in PR #413 (-0.017 bpb combined). LeakyReLU² proven by PR #569 and #535.

## Run command

```bash
torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=8 train_gpt.py
```

All hyperparameters set as defaults.

## Credits

- PR #576 (cmcdnd): Legal score-first TTT, temperature calibration
- PR #569 (gowtham0992): VRL + LeakyReLU² + Full GPTQ
- PR #413: VR + GA ablation
- PR #315 (jfprincz): Foundation architecture

comments.body:
### Code review

Found 3 issues:

1. **Reported val_bpb (1.0891) was produced by illegal pre-eval TTT, not the submitted code.** The README acknowledges "val_bpb = pending rerun" and states the old result is invalid per issue #402, but `submission.json` still reports `val_bpb: 1.0891` and `seeds: {"1337": 1.08909943}`. The log confirms the score came from epoch-based pre-eval TTT (train all val tokens, then score), not the score-first implementation now in `train_gpt.py`.

https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/blob/05075423dddbc7d5055b77c8dec4435d772e35f3/records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-23_11L_VR_GA_AdamWTTT_1.0891/submission.json#L3-L7

2. **`train_seed1337.log` was produced by different code than the submitted `train_gpt.py`.** The log shows `ttt:start lr=0.0005 epochs=10 optimizer=adamw` followed by `ttt_epoch:1/10` through `ttt_epoch:10/10` -- an epoch-based format. The submitted `train_gpt.py` implements chunk-based score-first TTT that would produce `ttt:start chunks=N chunk_tokens=...` and `ttt_chunk [X/Y]` log lines instead. The log does not match the code.

https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/blob/05075423dddbc7d5055b77c8dec4435d772e35f3/records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-23_11L_VR_GA_AdamWTTT_1.0891/train_seed1337.log#L95-L108

3. **TTT hyperparameter defaults are inconsistent across files.** `submission.json` reports `ttt_epochs: 10, ttt_lr: 0.0005` (lines 14-16). The `Hyperparameters` class in `train_gpt.py` defaults to the same (lines 122-123). But `main()` re-reads these env vars with different fallbacks: `TTT_EPOCHS` defaults to `"3"` and `TTT_LR` defaults to `"0.0001"` (lines 1926-1927). The README config block also shows `TTT_EPOCHS=3 TTT_LR=0.0001`. A fresh `torchrun` without env overrides would use 3 epochs at 0.0001 -- not reproducible against the claimed score.

https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/blob/05075423dddbc7d5055b77c8dec4435d772e35f3/records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-23_11L_VR_GA_AdamWTTT_1.0891/train_gpt.py#L1925-L1928

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

<sub>- If this code review was useful, please react with 👍. Otherwise, react with 👎.</sub>
